spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (2px-4px) for sharp, technical feel

persona_switcher.style: Left sidebar on desktop, horizontal scrolling tabs or bottom sheet on mobile.
persona_switcher.item_style: Sharp rectangle, 1px border. Active state: pure white bg, black left border (border-l-4 border-black). Inactive state: transparent bg, subtle text.
persona_switcher.avatar: Square boxes with initials, font-bold, bg-zinc-100 text-black.

chat_area.empty_state: Centered. Large heading using Cabinet Grotesk. Subtitle in IBM Plex Sans. Abstract tech grid background with 20% opacity.
chat_area.message_list: Vertical stack with gap-6. No dividing lines between messages.

message_bubbles.user: Sharp rectangles with 4px border-radius. bg-zinc-950 text-white. Left-aligned text.
message_bubbles.ai: Sharp rectangles with 4px border-radius. bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-950. Left-aligned text.

typing_indicator.style: Minimalist. 3 tiny square dots (w-2 h-2 bg-zinc-400) blinking in sequence (opacity animation, NOT bouncing). No bouncy balls.

suggestion_chips.style: Sharp rectangular borders (border border-zinc-200), transparent bg. Hover: border-zinc-950 text-zinc-950 bg-zinc-50 transition-colors. text-sm font-medium tracking-tight. Left aligned text inside.

input_bar.style: Sticky at bottom. 1px border border-zinc-300 bg-white. focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-black. Send button is a stark black square with a white arrow icon.

personas.name: Abhimanyu Saxena
suggestions: How to transition to Product Management?

personas.name: Kshitij Mishra
suggestions: Help me debug a React issue

background_grid.description: Abstract Swiss grid used for the empty state background or sidebar texture.

avatar_placeholder.description: Optional generic tech educator avatar for welcome card.

desk_image.description: Minimal desk image. Can be used in onboarding/welcome empty state if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout structure, maintaining the Swiss High-Contrast aesthetic.
Do NOT use standard rounded cards. Everything should be slightly brutalist: sharp corners (rounded-sm max), 1px solid borders, pure white and deep black contrasts.
Use Phosphor Icons (sharp/regular weight) or Lucide icons to match the thin line aesthetic.
Ensure the persona switcher clearly resets the chat state upon clicking a new persona.
Apply data-testid to all interactive and key elements.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings/Names, IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Do NOT use any gradients. Solid colors only.
